name: Raytron Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Raytron Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development of uncooled infrared imagining and MEMS sensor technology in China. The company offers driving assistant devices, infrared imaging solutions, and vacuum packaging products; MEMS design services for sensors; and ASIC, analog, and Hybrid IP design services. Its products are used in industrial temperature measurement, night version driver assistance systems, security monitoring, forest fire prevention, building energy efficiency assessment, consumer electronic products, IOT, and other applications. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Yantai, China.
